visual_description: A static, wide shot captures a dark, nighttime landscape. The foreground is almost entirely black, with only faint, indistinct shapes suggesting a rough, uneven terrain. In the distance, on the right side of the frame, a small, illuminated settlement is visible. The buildings are sparsely lit, with a few warm, glowing lights dotting the dark structures. The overall atmosphere is one of mystery and vastness, with the darkness dominating the scene. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera remains still throughout the clip. The audio is filled with a powerful and dramatic orchestral score. The music is grand and cinematic, with a sweeping, epic quality that evokes a sense of adventure and high stakes. It begins with a low, resonant, and slightly ominous tone before building in intensity with soaring strings and bold brass instruments, creating a mood of anticipation and awe. There is no dialogue or narration in the audio.
